body_txt: In the animal kingdom, growling is universally a sign of displeasure. So what better way to show that a character is still in touch with their savage, animalistic side than to have them give a menacing growl when something (or someone) manages to piss them off enough? Usually, characters who do this are a Little Bit Beastly or even a full-on Beast Man . The Wolf Man especially may be prone to this, as well as the Proud Warrior Race Guy . Can overlap with My Species Doth Protest Too Much . Not to be confused with Grumpy Growler , which means a character's voice is coarse and gruff all the time, though there can be overlap, for obvious reasons. Compare Furry Reminder and Angrish .
